scope: local feasibility gate for adding a real reference/identity-conditioning path after prompt-only MOD-17 Canny retries failed or mixed

main_flow_ipadapter_nodes.observed_role: loads PLUS FACE portrait preset and outputs model plus ipadapter
applies reference image to model with weight/start/end/weight_type controls

local_model_scan_summary: ComfyUI/models/clip_vision contains only placeholder file put_clip_vision_models_here
ComfyUI/models/clip contains only placeholder/config support, not a CLIP-vision IPAdapter model
No ComfyUI/models/ipadapter directory with usable model files was present
config/comfyui_extra_model_paths.yaml maps only checkpoints, controlnet, and upscale_models under C:\Comfy_UI_Main\models

decision.candidate_path_summary: A hybrid identity-aware MOD-17 path should apply IPAdapter face-reference conditioning to the RealVisXL model first, then apply ControlNet Canny to the text conditioning before KSampler. The main-flow source already proves this wiring pattern exists separately.
decision.blocker: Local ComfyUI does not currently have the IPAdapter custom node plus required IPAdapter and CLIP-vision model files, so a real local identity-conditioned generation would fail or be only a paper claim.
required_unblock_work: Install or sync ComfyUI_IPAdapter_plus into C:\Comfy_UI_Main\ComfyUI\custom_nodes
Install or sync the required SDXL-compatible IPAdapter model into a ComfyUI model path
Install or sync the required CLIP-vision model into ComfyUI/models/clip_vision or an extra model path
Run local object_info proof for IPAdapterUnifiedLoader and IPAdapter
Only then build and execute a hybrid Canny+IPAdapter run package
decision.next_action: Do not continue prompt-only MOD-17 Canny retries. Switch to the next named local Plan/Tracker task while this exact local IPAdapter identity-conditioning blocker remains open.
